title: 24 undocumented environment variables
description: Environment variables used in code but not in contract: REACT_APP_API_URL, REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL, DB_HOST, DB_PORT, DB_NAME, DB_USER, DB_PASSWORD, DB_SSL_CA, DB_POOL_MAX, DB_POOL_MIN, DB_IDLE_TIMEOUT, DB_CONN_TIMEOUT, DB_STATEMENT_TIMEOUT, DB_QUERY_TIMEOUT, CLIENT_ORIGIN, JWT_ISSUER, JWT_AUDIENCE, ADMIN_ORIGIN, DATABASE_URL, API_BASE_URL, LIVE_API, TEST_AUTH_TOKEN, API_URL, VITE_API_URL
probable_cause: Code references environment variables not listed in the contract file
remediation: Add missing variables to the environment contract file
